SUB: VIDEO RECORDING LINK OF THE EARNING CALL HELD ON 29TH JULY 
2022 
 
 
Dear Sir / Madam, 
 
This is reference to our letter dated 22nd July 2022, intimating about the Earning Conference Call 
held on 29th July 2022. 
 
Video of the said call can be accessed on the website of the Company on www.eihltd.com 
 
or clicking on following link 
 
https://www.eihltd.com/-/media/eihltd/pdf-files/disclosure/investor-analysts-meet/gmt20220729-093251-
recording-1920x1140.mp4/ 
 
Kindly take the above in your records. 
 
 
Thanking you, 
 
Yours faithfully 
 
For EIH Limited 
 
 
 
Lalit Kumar Sharma 
Company Secretary
